paragraphs: Business Analyst with 1+ years of experience transforming operational data, business requirements, and stakeholder feedback into reporting solutions, process improvements, and measurable business outcomes. Hands-on experience using SQL, Power BI, and business intelligence practices to analyze performance trends, strengthen KPI visibility, improve reporting accuracy, and support planning decisions.

Skilled in requirements elicitation, workflow analysis, root cause investigation, UAT coordination, and cross-functional collaboration across business, product, and technical teams. Currently pursuing a Master's degree in Data Science with a focus on analytics-driven business problem solving.
